title: Middle Eastern Lamb Shawarma
description: A classic street food from the Middle East, this lamb shawarma recipe is a flavorful and aromatic sandwich. Marinated lamb is grilled to perfection and served in a warm pita with your favorite toppings.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together shawarma spice blend, yogurt, garlic, and cilantro.
Add the lamb strips to the marinade and mix until coated.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Remove the lamb from the marinade and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for 5 minutes.
Assemble the shawarma by slicing the cooked lamb and serving it in the pita with tomato, onion, and tzatziki sauce.
